headline.text: L3 MFM detected *2 pieces* of caramel twist wrap in product — matrix emptied, inspected, and cleared back to production.

summary: One foreign material event at L3 MFM resolved within shift. L3 ML1 continues to see air leaks in packaging seal tests — 3 of 5 bars failed at midshift, 4 of 10 failed at swing shift.

food_safety.title: Caramel twist wrap detected in MFM product
food_safety.summary: Line lead found 2 pieces of caramel twist wrap running through MFM during production; matrix was stopped, emptied, inspected, and upstream areas re-verified before restart.
food_safety.status: Resolved — matrix emptied, product verified, upstream areas re-checked, and line restarted.

quality.title: Recurring air leaks in ML1 chocolate bar packaging
quality.summary: Water tests show 3 of 5 bars failed at 13:04 (midshift), then 4 of 10 failed at 15:42 (swing shift) with small leaks at package corners; line leader notified both times.
quality.status: Open — recurring seal quality issue flagged to line leadership, investigation ongoing.

sanitation.title: ML1 visual cleaning check delayed at shift start
sanitation.summary: QA flagged at 05:30 that conveyor belt section and line cabin visual checks had not been performed; checks completed and passed by 05:46.
sanitation.status: Resolved — visual inspection completed 16 minutes after flag; cabana passed.

opportunities.text: Consider adding packaging material removal verification to MFM changeover checklist — based on caramel twist wrap detected during production after product switch.
Consider adding flowwrap seal parameter review to ML1 startup protocol — based on 7 of 15 bars failing water test across two shifts with corner leaks.
Consider pre-shift visual check timing reminder in ML1 startup checklist — based on conveyor/cabin checks not performed until 30 minutes into 3rd shift.
